heading: Utilization of associations and trade facilities
label: 714j Utilization of associations and trade facilities
text: The Corporation may, in the conduct of its business, utilize on a contract or fee basis, committees or associations of producers, producer-owned and producer-controlled cooperative associations, and trade facilities.
notes: Exceptions From Transfer of FunctionsFor exception of functions of corporations of Department of Agriculture from transfer of functions to Secretary of Agriculture by Reorg. Plan No. 2 of 1953, see Exceptions From Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 712a of this title
